name: Linear
summary: Disciplined dark-first product UI. Hierarchy from surface lift and hairline borders, one indigo accent, near-monochrome.
source: Observed from linear.app; values are public-site approximations, not official brand assets.

font.license: Inter is open source (SIL OFL). Free to bundle.

rules: Use the surface ladder for elevation. Do not use drop shadows for hierarchy.
Use the indigo accent only for the brand mark, focus rings, and one primary CTA per section.
Keep borders as hairlines. No heavy dividers.
Communicate hierarchy with weight and size, not decorative color.
